title: Provenance
description: Where a value came from: an acyclic derivation DAG (RFC-0001 §4.6). Provenance is dynamic metadata and is NOT part of code identity (it is not hashed). Provenance references ARE content hashes of the producing definitions.

x-mycelium.$comment: Acyclicity of the DAG is a structural invariant over linked provenance records, not checkable within a single JSON instance; enforced by the Phase-1 builder (M-103).

ContentHash.description: A content-address: '<algo>:<digest>' (e.g. 'blake3:Hh3...'). The concrete hash algorithm/encoding is fixed in Phase 1 (M-103); the pattern fixes only the shape.

oneOf.description: A primitive/constant origin with no inputs.

inputs.description: Content hashes of the input provenance/definitions.
